---
title: "Photography"
---

On this page is a collection of different aspects of my professional and personal life.



::: {layout-ncol=2}

Group photo of Boston College honors thesis students

![](gandalf_image_1.jpg)

![](gandalf_image_2.jpg)
Community outreach initiative during COVID-19 pandemic featured on local news media




Meet our family dog!
![](gandalf_image_3.jpg)

![](gandalf_image_4.jpg)

:::
